items.finding: Committed generated index was stale and blocked Pages.
items.action: Regenerate now; keep until publication architecture changes.

items.finding: Snapshot validator hard-codes obsolete counts and is still advertised as current.
items.action: Remove from active test guidance; retain as clearly historical until manifest-based replacement is complete.

items.finding: 1,071 per-message JSON files duplicate the aggregate JSONL as a generated access form.
items.action: Do not delete until every individual-path citation migrates and deterministic regeneration is proven.

items.finding: Byte-identical captures represent separately observed endpoints and are both manifest-bound.
items.action: Retain unless a schema migration preserves endpoint provenance another way.

items.finding: Approximately 11.9 MB of source-like captures live under operations.
items.action: Move only in a dedicated manifest/checksum migration.

items.finding: Four placeholder files can become one publication contract when the new publication layer is implemented.
items.action: Retain during the current GitHub Pages transition.

items.finding: Older and nested campaign artifacts preserve evidence packets, decisions, and closeout history.
items.action: Index as completed legacy work; do not bulk-delete.

paths: 42 remote branches already merged into main
items.finding: Merged branch refs remain; four non-ancestor branches also remain.
items.action: Delete merged refs only after branch-policy confirmation; reconcile the economic-report branch before any deletion.

items.finding: Several byte-identical files serve distinct archive, campaign, or review roles.
items.action: Retain until a documented schema migration removes the compatibility role.

items.finding: Windows Git line-ending conversion makes one lore fixed-point test fail locally although Linux repository CI passes.
items.action: Add a scoped line-ending contract in a dedicated compatibility change; do not bulk-renormalize preserved lore evidence in Phase 1.
